guide.title: PariScore Guide
guide.subtitle: Master probabilities, dominate betting
guide.search_placeholder: Search the guide... (e.g. ELO, xG, Edge)
guide.card_elo_desc: The ELO rating system gauges team strength on a scale from 2500+ (top) to under 1500. Updated in real time.
guide.card_poisson_desc: Probabilistic model computing the probability of each score from both teams' expected goals (xG) average.
guide.card_xg_desc: Advanced metric measuring chance quality. More accurate than raw stats for predicting future performance.
guide.card_form_desc: Compact view of the last 5 results: W (win), D (draw), L (loss). Quickly spot a team's momentum.
guide.card_pwr_desc: Composite 0–100 score shown in the Standings column of the Matches table. Synthesis of 4 pillars: opponent-weighted form (40%), short 3-game streak (25%), offensive/defensive xG quality (20%), strength of opposition (15%).
guide.card_formtab_desc: 3-zone snapshot for a pro bettor decision in <10s: Triple KPI Header (Form Score 0-100 + PPG L5 + xG diff), Form Barcode of last 10 matches with recency weighting + Top 5 opponent + venue, auto-generated NLG AI verdict with market recommendation.
guide.card_live_desc: Follow ongoing matches with real scores, live stats (possession, shots, xG) and minute-by-minute updates.
guide.card_filters_desc: Select one or more countries/leagues. Sort by kickoff time (1h, 2h, 6h) to plan your bets.
guide.card_value_desc: Filter bets with a positive edge (≥3%). Spot opportunities where the odds offer more value than the true probability.
guide.tennis_article_title: Reading the Tennis Value Bets table
guide.tennis_article_subtitle: Proprietary set 1 / set 2 model — every column explained
guide.intensity_subtitle: The thermometer that dictates when to step in
guide.intensity_calm_what: Little action. Closed match, teams sizing each other up.
guide.intensity_calm_action: Don't enter. Wait for it to develop.
guide.intensity_lively_what: A few shots, possession building. Match taking shape.
guide.intensity_lively_action: Watch. Valid for Under if level near half-time.
guide.intensity_intense_what: Regular shots, rising xG, open match. Visible pressure on one side.
guide.intensity_intense_action: Main entry zone. Confirm with xG and momentum.
guide.intensity_boiling_what: Multiple goals, constant shots, momentum swinging every 5 min.
guide.intensity_boiling_action: Act fast — odds are moving. Prioritize Over and BTTS markets.
guide.strategies_intro: PariScore deploys predictive strategies built by a team of quant analysts. Each tipster is an algorithmic persona calibrated on thousands of matches. Its daily picks rest on bivariate probabilistic models, Shin-Hurley devigging and Expected Goals data.
guide.strat1_caption: Score matrix — BTTS probability computed across all home/away configurations (0-6 × 0-6).
guide.strat2_subtitle: Over 2.5 — At least 3 total goals in the match
guide.strat2_caption: Distribution curve — cumulative Over 0.5 / 1.5 / 2.5 / 3.5 probability by total λ.
guide.strat3_subtitle: Over 6.5 — At least 7 corners in the match
guide.strat3_caption: Total xG / observed corners correlation — 2,400 matches from Ligue 1, Premier League and Bundesliga (2024-25 season).
guide.glossary_rubrique: Quantitative terminology — The comparator's key metrics
guide.gloss_topx_high: Among the most reliable matches in its league — high data volume + tight CI + real source.
guide.gloss_topx_mid: Medium reliability. Cross-check with EV and BTTS accuracy before betting.
guide.gloss_topx_low: Low rank (little data / wide CI / simulated data). Avoid high-stakes bets.
guide.gloss_formtab_zone1_desc: 2 side-by-side cards (Home / Away). Each card shows 3 KPIs:
guide.gloss_formtab_zone3_desc: Text block auto-generated from Zone 1 + Zone 2. 4 templates by Δ Form Score:
settings.section_sub: Control your PariScore experience, including affiliate link transparency.
settings.affiliate_card_desc: When you click "🎰 Bet", we use an affiliate link that funds PariScore's development. You can turn this off.
settings.affiliate_disclosure_1: 💡 Full transparency: Affiliate links earn us a commission when you sign up with a partner bookmaker. This funds 100% of PariScore's development. Same model as Datafoot.fr.
settings.affiliate_disclosure_2: If you turn this off, the "🎰 Bet" buttons open bookmaker sites directly without tracking.
settings.telegram_card_desc: Get value bets and match alerts straight to Telegram.

comparateur.anj_note: ⚠️ Bookmakers not licensed by ANJ (French Gaming Authority) are shown for information only. PariScore does not redirect to any operator unauthorized in France. Bet responsibly — jeux-interdits-aux-mineurs.fr
nba.disclaimer: Game-by-game Elo + Pythagorean + Four Factors (blend), independent of odds. Value = EV vs devigged odds. ⚠️ Uncalibrated — analytical use, not betting advice.
wnba.disclaimer: Elo + Pythagorean + Four Factors (blend), independent of odds. Value = EV vs devigged odds. ⚠️ Uncalibrated for WNBA — analytical use, not betting advice.

tennis.source_aiscore_cache: ESPN source + serving enriched via AiScore (5min cache)
tennis.source_aiscore_ondemand: ESPN source + serving enriched via AiScore (on-demand throttled fetch)
tennis.bppi_insufficient: Insufficient pressure data — recent match or incomplete source.
tennis.bppi_weights_note: Weights: 30% clutch · 30% offense · 20% serve · 20% momentum · × context (deuce/set point/match point). Source: 30s live poll (BSD + ESPN).
tennis.bppi_cell_missing_title: Insufficient pressure data (recent match or incomplete source)
tennis.dr_guide_title: Dominance Ratio definition & calculation — open Guide
tennis.dr_per_set_wrap_title: Dominance Ratio per set — {0} · current set highlighted
tennis.dr_delta_title: Δ DR {0} — current set ({1}) − match ({2}) = {3}{4} · source {5}
tennis.games_guide_sub: Over / Under games count, set by set
tennis.games_guide_what_body: For each set (S1, S2, S3, and S4/S5 at Grand Slams) we estimate the probability of hitting the {0}, {1}, {2} and {3} (= set with no tie-break) lines. The row shows the strongest line; click a {4} for all 4 detailed probabilities.
tennis.games_guide_hold_body: From Sackmann stats (last 50 matches, surface-filtered) we compute each player's {0}, adjusted for the opponent's {1} and court speed. O'Malley's closed-form formula → P(server holds).
tennis.games_guide_pmf_label: 2 · Exact games distribution of the set (PMF).
tennis.games_guide_pmf_body: Dynamic programming enumerates every game sequence (alternating serve, two-game lead rule, 6-6 → tie-break = 13 games) and sums probabilities by total games. From it we derive:
tennis.games_guide_gate_high_body: → ultra-dominant serve: O 9.5 and tie-break boosted.
tennis.games_guide_gate_low_body: → lots of breaks: O 7.5/8.5 dampened, Under strengthened.
tennis.games_guide_sets23_body: Holds re-adjusted for fatigue (last match > 150 min → −2% serve effectiveness).
tennis.games_guide_gs_body: Sets 4 and 5 shown only at Grand Slams. Physical decay on O 9.5: ×0.93 in set 4, ×0.93² in set 5 — except {0} (Ace > 15%) who holds serve.
tennis.games_guide_colors_note: · 100% local (Jeff Sackmann data), no per-set market odds.
tennis.pred_guide_sub: Directive KPI + 3 recommended bets, prematch & live
tennis.pred_guide_what_body: A decision engine that condenses every tennis model already computed into {0} and {1}. No new source: 100% derived from existing columns.
tennis.pred_guide_bet_fort_def: = bet with EV > 5% and lower confidence-interval bound > 0 and green calibration badge (strict rule).
tennis.pred_guide_value_def: = best bet with EV > 0 or probability ≥ 65%.
tennis.pred_guide_live_def: = match in progress, bets recomputed to the score.
tennis.pred_guide_line2_body: The 3 markets with the best {0} from a candidate pool:
tennis.pred_guide_prematch_markets: : Match Winner · Set 1 Winner · Exact sets score · Wins ≥ 1 set (Markov) · Total games O/U · King of Aces.
tennis.pred_guide_live_markets1: (auto-switches when the match starts): Winner re-priced by sets won · Current set winner (server + games gap) ·
tennis.pred_guide_live_ou_set_note: (8.5 line adjusted to games already played) ·
tennis.pred_guide_live_ou_match_note: (21.5 line) · Comeback ≥ 1 set · Current set tie-break.
tennis.pred_guide_confidence_body: = model calibration (historical accuracy). Penalized ×0.8 if Elo and BSD models diverge strongly (HIGH), ×0.6 / ×0.8 if the match sample is small.
tennis.pred_guide_accord_body: = convergence between surface Elo and BSD ML (1 = perfect agreement).
tennis.pred_guide_repricing_body: The winner is re-rated (± ~15 pts per set lead), the current set factors in server and games gap, O/Us are recomputed from games already played. Updated every 30s.
tennis.pred_guide_odds_market: = real market odds (Odds API) — mostly available on Match Winner, EV computed against these odds.
tennis.pred_guide_odds_fair: = model fair odds (no bookmaker margin) = 1 / probability — shown on unpriced markets (Set 1, sets score, ≥1 set, games O/U, aces, tie-break, live). It's the "fair" price: if your book offers better, that's value.
tennis.pred_guide_reminder_body: A decision-support tool, not a guarantee. "PASS" means: no value — don't force a bet.
tennis.mental_title: Bounce-back = set 2 won after set 1 LOST · Kill = set 2 won after set 1 WON. Format P1 / P2.
tennis.alert_fatigue_title: Fatigue — last match > 150 min (degraded set 2 physical hold)

guide.glossary_ev_def: Expected value - Average profit expected per unit staked. EV = (win probability × payout) - (loss probability × stake)
guide.glossary_elo_def: Team strength rating system. Scale: 1500 (beginner) to 2500+ (world elite)
guide.glossary_xg_def: Number of goals expected based on chance quality. xG = sum of the probabilities of each shot
guide.glossary_ppg_def: Points Per Game - Average points earned per match
guide.glossary_overround_def: Bookmaker margin - Surplus relative to 100% of probabilities
guide.glossary_btts_def: Both To Score - Both teams score at least one goal
guide.glossary_dnb_def: Win with refund if the match is drawn
guide.glossary_handicap_def: Points advantage or disadvantage added to the final score
guide.glossary_arbitrage_def: Betting on all outcomes to guarantee a profit regardless of the result
guide.glossary_valuebet_def: A bet where the true probability is higher than the odds' implied probability
